hero.lede: QS Technology Co., Ltd. is proud to be the first company in Vietnam to develop, apply and commercialize CNC controller products. After years of development, products under the QS brand have earned growing trust from customers both at home and abroad.

story.heading: About the company
story.p1: QS Technology Co., Ltd. — we are proud to be the first company in Vietnam to develop, apply and commercialize CNC controller products.
story.p2: After a few years of development, products under the QS Technology brand have steadily earned greater trust and interest from customers both at home and abroad.
story.p3: Drawing on the strengths and experience accumulated over years of work in machine manufacturing, automation systems and electronic circuit board design,
story.p3strong: we are confident in mastering the technology and fully meeting our customers' expectations.

mission.label: Mission
mission.body: To become the No. 1 company in the CNC field in Vietnam. To deliver high-quality products serving the domestic market. To bring products created from the intellect and ingenuity of the Vietnamese people to international standards.

vision.label: Vision
vision.body: To become a spearhead that drives the development of Vietnam's CNC industry in the future.

items.d: Confront and conquer hard engineering problems, turning the challenges of the CNC industry into momentum for growth.
Continuously adopt new technology and refine hardware and firmware so our products stay ahead.
Independent design thinking from circuit board to firmware, creating control solutions of our own making.
Dedicated, open-minded and accountable in every product and every customer interaction.
Honoring our commitments on quality and service, building lasting trust with customers at home and abroad.

quote.body: There is no secret to success. It is simply the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.

images.pcb: CNC controller board designed and manufactured by QS Technology
